p2p_enrich.notes: Added 2 pass_to_pass CI tests: (1) test_repo_format_check - runs 'pnpm format:check' which executes prettier --check, (2) test_repo_unit_tests - runs 'pnpm test:run' which executes vitest run (35 test files passed on base commit). Discovered CI commands from .github/workflows/tests-js.yml: pnpm format:check (PASS), pnpm test:run (PASS), pnpm lint (FAIL - missing @eslint/js package with --ignore-scripts), pnpm ts:check (FAIL - pre-existing 419 TypeScript errors in repo at base commit).
